final:
module up_counter_4bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
